#  View Recent Drawings from the Project Overview Screen (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher level permissions on one or more project tools.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * The 'Show Recent Drawings' setting must be enabled in the **filter** ![Icon Filter Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/db29ce856a2c97e4020ce5a8b1938101/23232a25a4a0afca8154154723d17108/icon-filter-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=18) menu in order to see recent drawings on the Project Overview screen. See [Configure Project Overview Screen Preferences (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/project-overview-screen-android/tutorials/configure-project-overview-screen-preferences-android).
    * The Recent Drawings section appears on the Project Overview screen _after_ you view one or more drawings for that project.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an Android mobile device and select the relevant project.  
_Note:_ This loads the **Tools** ![Icon Toolbox Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c9bbbcd20b76c96e29ec5ce52eb80efd/664f41ccaaf657eac210c22b36ce0c7f/icon-toolbox-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=20) screen with the **Project Overview**.
  2. Under 'Recent Drawings', tap the recent drawing that you want to view.  
This redirects you to the drawing in the Drawings tool viewer.
  3. Tap **Done** when you are finished viewing the drawing.
  4. _Optional:_ Tap **See All** to navigate to the Drawings tool, or tap **Drawings** on the bottom menu. See [View Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/view-drawings-android).


## See Also
  * [Configure Project Overview Screen Preferences (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/project-overview-screen-android/tutorials/configure-project-overview-screen-preferences-android)
  * [About the Project Overview Screen (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/project-overview-screen-android/tutorials/about-the-project-overview-screen-android)
  * [Manage Project Settings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/project-overview-screen-android/tutorials/manage-project-settings-android)
title: View Recent Drawings from the Project Overview Screen (Android)
description: How to view recent drawings from the Project Overview screen of a project in the Procore Android app.
